## [Synthesizing ill-defined robotic control]{style="display: block; text-align: center;"}
How should RL model and leverage imperfect human feedback to achieve *human-defined* objectives?

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Learning Reward Functions...**
<br>
<div style="font-size: 0.8em;">
<!-- Learn rewards and policies that accomplish *intended* objectives -->
Tractably learn rewards from humans

1. Feedback types
2. Aquisition Strategy
3. Credit Assignment
</div>

<!-- 1. Inverse reward design
2. RLHF
3. COACH -->
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**...from Imperfect Human Feedback**
<br>
<div style="font-size: 0.8em;">
Model the imperfections in human feedback

1. Inconsistency
2. Sub-optimality
3. Heterogeneity
</div>

<!-- 1. Inconsistency
2. Suboptimality
3. Heterogeneity -->
:::

::::
